name: Cash Store
description_short: Cash Store offers unsecured installment loans with same-day funding at a physical Houston location, accepting applicants with bad or no credit.
description_long:
Cash Store is a retail lending operation that operates physical storefront locations, with the Houston location (Store #30796) situated at 19734 Tomball Parkway. The company specializes in installment lending and appears to be part of a larger network, with references to Check 'n Go branding and Pocket360 services. They position themselves as accessible lenders willing to work with consumers who may have limited credit history or poor credit scores.

Cash Store's primary offering is unsecured installment loans described as personal loans that can be used for major purchases, bill consolidation, or unexpected expenses. Loans are repaid on a fixed schedule over time. The company also offers Netspend Prepaid Mastercard products and retail remote refinancing/reload options for existing customers. The application process is hybrid: pre-qualification occurs online, but final approval and funding require an in-person visit to a physical location.

The Houston location maintains strong customer satisfaction with a 4.9 Google rating across 212 reviews, with recurring praise for specific staff members. Same-day funding is explicitly promised upon loan acceptance. The company operates with standard business hours (10am-6pm Monday-Friday, 10am-2pm Saturday) and maintains a straightforward application process requiring proof of income, valid ID, active checking account, and a working phone number.

As a personal installment lender, Cash Store fills a gap for consumers unable to access traditional bank loans, though the specific interest rates, APR terms, and repayment periods are not disclosed on this location page. The emphasis on accepting bad or no credit suggests higher-risk lending with likely corresponding rates, though this remains unconfirmed from available website content.
address: 5401 Farm to Market 1626 Ste 125, Kyle, TX 78640

company_info.headquarters: 5401 Farm to Market 1626 Ste 125, Kyle, TX 78640

pros: Same-day funding available upon loan acceptance and origination
Willing to consider applicants with bad credit or no credit history
Online pre-qualification process streamlines initial application
Physical location provides in-person support and explanation of terms
High customer satisfaction (4.9/5 rating) with 212 Google reviews
Flexible loan uses: consolidation, major purchases, or unexpected expenses
Fixed repayment schedule on installment loans (no balloon payments implied)
cons: No interest rates, APR, or loan amount ranges disclosed on website
Requires physical store visit for final approval (not fully online)
Limited product information—no details on maximum loan amounts or terms
Checking account must be active for at least 30 days (excludes new account holders)
Website currently showing maintenance message, limiting real-time information access
best_for: Consumers with bad or no credit seeking quick installment loans
Applicants requiring in-person guidance through the lending process
People consolidating bills or covering unexpected major expenses
diagnosis: Cash Store is best for Houston-area consumers with bad or no credit who need quick cash and can visit a physical location, with same-day funding as a key advantage. The main caveat is that specific rates, terms, and maximum loan amounts are not disclosed, making cost comparison impossible before in-store application.
services: Unsecured installment loans with fixed repayment schedules
Retail remote refinancing for existing loan customers
Retail remote reloans for existing customers
In-person customer service and loan consultation
